slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. Solid dark color (nary, navi, purple). Fills the entire page. No people, no text.
Brand logo at top-left, about 48px. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape.
Primary CTA ('Get Started', 'Buy Now'). Rounded, border-radius 8px. Text-accent-color. Running text.
Heading, body, subtext. Heading large, font-bold, tracking-tight. Supply dummy text.

mechanic: A hero with dark nary bg, logo, headline, body, subtext, CTA button. Left-text, right-image layout.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3. Framer Motion v12.
reskinNotes: Blank slate - dummy text, no backend.
